title: Pensions schemes newsletter 176 — December 2025
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news for pension schemes. Pension schemes newsletter 176 has articles on:   transfers to qualifying recognised overseas pension scheme (QROPS) protections and enhancements — members protections and enhancements public service pensions remedy — offsetting unauthorised payments mandatory tax adviser registration relief at source (RAS) — residency status reports pension scheme return — submission deadline reminder event reporting   "
